facts.claim: Cluster governs transfusion appropriateness (RBC, platelets) with restrictive evidence-based thresholds and mechanical restraint avoidance; feeds blood-product governance & neuro-sedation domains
Rule count: 12 total; status: 3 OK / 8 DISCREPANCY / 1 AMBIGUOUS; verdicts: 2 NOT_APPLICABLE / 1 VERIFIED / 1 UNVERIFIABLE / 8 DISCREPANCY

12 rules span 5 categories: alert-threshold (4), triage-eligibility (4), scheduling-operational (1), clinical-scoring (1), alert-threshold facade (1), decision-tree variants (multiple); only 3 wired (001, 004 via 005, 012); 9 unwired or inert

Systemic defect: fromkeys-None-values bug renders antecedent/diagnosis-exclusion checks vacuous across RULES-002,003,004,006,009,010 (SCA/AVC/dementia filters non-functional); window copy-paste bug (RULE-004 cpoe_4hrs set to 6h); field-mismatch bug (RULE-004 reads diurna_plaquetas from cpoe model -> always 0); operator-precedence bug (RULE-002 Hb>=7 threshold defeated)

Facade/implementation divergence: RULE-EFICIENCIA-012 (VERIFIED payload) documents clinically sound intent (restrictive transfusion, discharge gates, delirium prevention); core wired predicates (RULES-002,004,006,008,010,011) are broken—operator precedence, wrong fields, inverted logic, range subscripting crash—making clinical intent unreachable
facts.source_ref: eficiencia.yaml RULE-EFICIENCIA-012 vs RULES-002..011 divergence blocks

facts.claim: PT-BR clinical vocabulary (preserve verbatim): 'Concentrado de hemacias com filtro' (RBC concentrate), 'Concentrado de plaquetas com filtro' (platelet concentrate), 'SCA - Sindrome coronariana aguda' (ACS), 'Melena'/'Enterorragia' (GI bleeding), 'Suspeita de ME' (suspected brain death), 'Contencao mecanica' (mechanical restraint), 'Reavaliar indicacao'; window units in dias/horas
facts.source_ref: eficiencia.yaml inputs, descriptions, logic fields (preserved from ahlabs-trilhas)

load_bearing_rules.what: RBC transfusion at Hb>=7 (AMARELO trigger). Wired via calcular_alerta_v2(). Intended: restricts to Hb<7 absent active bleeding/SCA/AVC.
Platelet transfusion at Plt>25000 (VERMELHO trigger). Wired via calcular_alerta_v2() but permanently False (reads diurna_plaquetas from cpoe model—nonexistent field—defaults to 0).
Alert aggregation (calcular_alerta_v2). Multiplexes 3 criteria (c3, c5, c10) → AMARELO/VERMELHO/NEUTRO enum. Orchestrates wired alert signal.

Facade display payload (get_payload_trilha_eficiencia). 10 alert labels + recommendation text. References AABB transfusion thresholds verbatim (Carson et al. JAMA 2023, TRICC). Wired as eficiencia_automatica.
Mechanical restraint without agitation (AMARELO). Intended: restraint + GCS>12 + ABSENCE of delirium/RASS>1. Code checks PRESENCE of delirium (inverted).
ICU discharge readiness (unwired). Intended: >24h admission + good GCS/temp/vitals + room-air O2 + no VM/pressors. Permanently False due to wrong aggregate key ('temp' vs 'max_temp').
RBC 6-7 gate with >=2 units (unwired). Hb thresholds correctly parenthesized; SCA/AVC exclusions inert (fromkeys). Facade RULE-EFICIENCIA-012 labels it 'Hb>6 / 2u'.

Coma without sedation (unwired). Intended: GCS<6 + no sedatives in 6h → brain-death flag. Code uses GCS<13; sedative absence uses AND-combined filter (requires all drugs present simultaneously, nearly always False).

Delirium risk bundle (unwired). OR of 11+ risk factors (SOFA>=5, age>75, antibiotic, Na dysrange, etc.). Contains runtime crash: `int(rass) in range[1,5]` (subscripting range object) instead of `in range(1,5)`.

Repeated exams within minimum-repeat windows (unwired). Flags >1 exam re-order inside its class window (5d endoscopy/CT, 7d labs, 14d angio, 21d ECG/ultrasound, 30d EEG/MRI). Threshold >1 positive sum across ALL windows combined.

systemic_issues.description: Hb>=7 threshold: `diurna_hemoglobina or 0 >= 7` parses as `diurna_hemoglobina or (0>=7)`, testing truthiness of Hb, not threshold. Fires on any non-empty Hb + RBC order, defeating intended >=7 gate.

Platelet value reads ultima_cpoe.diurna_plaquetas (nonexistent on cpoe model; diurna_plaquetas lives on evolucao). getattr default 0 → '>25000' always False → sole VERMELHO criterion permanently False.
cpoe_4hrs for CVC/CDL catheter exclusion defined with timedelta(hours=6) (copy of cpoe_6hrs). Intended 4h window actually 6h.
Antecedent/diagnosis membership checks use vars(objeto).fromkeys(field_names).values() → all None → vacuously True. SCA/AVC/dementia exclusions non-functional across multiple rules.
`int(rass) in range[1, 5]` attempts subscript on range object (range is not subscriptable). Correct: `in range(1, 5)`. Criterion crashes if rass is truthy and wired.

RULE-006: delirium check reads PRESENCE (truthy) instead of absence. RULE-008: max_temp key mismatch + GCS/TEC/lactate thresholds inverted. RULE-011: all([...]) requires FiO2>45, PEEP>10, GCS<13, RASS<-2 (HIGH-support) instead of step-down readiness.
Criteria 1-11 defined but most not computed (commented out in calcular_criterios); only c3, c5, c10 are computed; criteria used in alternative legacy calcular_alerta() function but never called.

RULE-012 (VERIFIED, facades) documents correct clinical intent (AABB transfusion thresholds, discharge gates, delirium prevention). Core wired rules (002, 004, 006, 008) broken via operator-precedence, field-mismatch, inverted logic—intent unreachable.

feeds_domains: early-warning-scores (discharge readiness, step-down gates; transfusion appropriateness)
notes: All 12 rules extracted from ahlabs-trilhas commit 8166c07eaef97ad4f9b2a0e51235f3fc3d0feb7f (eficiencia v3 model). Facade source: core/facade/trilha_eficiencia.py. RULE-EFICIENCIA-012 sources alert-text payload from get_payload_trilha_eficiencia(); it is the verified active payload. Core predicates (RULES-001..011) are systematically broken via precedence, field, window, and logic bugs. CRITICAL for IntensiCare v2: facade intent (RULE-012, VERIFIED) is clinically sound and AABB-aligned; implementation must be entirely rewritten to fix operator precedence, field lookups, temporal windows, diagnosis exclusions, and logic flow.
